mapper.select: SELECT e.TargetTotal,e.AccumulativeTotal,e.AccumulativeTotalByWind,e.CoalGross,e.GasGross,e.AvgGasContent, e.ExtractionReachQuantity,e.YesterdayQuantity,e.YesterdayWindExhaustGas,s.ConstructionName, s.StripeCode,ROUND((e.GasGross-e.AccumulativeTotal)/e.CoalGross,2)AS CurrentConcentration from extractionjudge e RIGHT JOIN stripeinfo s ON e.StripeId=s.id

SELECT e.TargetTotal,e.AccumulativeTotal,e.AccumulativeTotalByWind,e.CoalGross,e.GasGross,e.AvgGasContent, e.ExtractionReachQuantity,e.YesterdayQuantity,e.YesterdayWindExhaustGas,s.ConstructionName, s.StripeCode,ROUND((e.GasGross-e.AccumulativeTotal)/e.CoalGross,2)AS CurrentConcentration from extractionjudge e RIGHT JOIN stripeinfo s ON e.StripeId=s.id where s.StripeCode=#{StripeCode}
